summary: Added suspicious rendered-crop dimension detection to the current output-integrity audit. The audit now opens existing relative PNG artifacts, deduplicates repeated fields for the same record/path, and reports extreme height or aspect-ratio candidates with evidence.

files_changed.why: Added PNG dimension inspection, suspicious-dimension thresholds, counts, check status, and failure evidence.
Added a regression test that writes valid PNGs and verifies suspicious question and mark-scheme crops are flagged.

test_results: Initial targeted pytest run failed as expected because the audit did not inspect dimensions.
Final targeted pytest run passed: 11 passed.
Live output-integrity audit exited 1 because it found 31 suspicious rendered-crop dimension candidates in current output.
repo_hygiene_notes: The live audit report was written under this run's .agent-runs iteration folder.
known_risks: Dimension thresholds are heuristic and identify review candidates, not semantic proof of contamination.
The current generated output now fails output-integrity-audit until the 31 suspicious candidates are reviewed or repaired.
